breaking.title: Three policemen killed, 34 injured in two terrorist attacks in NW Pakistan
breaking.summary: Police said the attack occurred near Ladam Top at Haider when the convoy was passing through the area. The assailants first hurled hand grenades and then opened heavy fire on the convoy.

breaking.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran as Trump warns Tehran it 'better behave'
breaking.summary: US President Donald Trump says he is yet to decide whether or not he will "finish off" Iran.

breaking.title: Blasts Heard In Kyiv As EU Chief Visits Ukraine Amid Russian Missile Alert
breaking.summary: European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen is on Ukraine tour to boost defence ties.

breaking.title: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
breaking.summary: A large section of the giant Morandi motorway bridge crumbled and collapsed on to the railway tracks below.

breaking.title: Russian attacks kill 14 as Ukraine hits Black Sea oil tankers
breaking.summary: Civilian casualties are reported in a number of Ukrainian regions, while Kyiv hits 20 Russian vessels in the Black Sea.

breaking.title: India's war-risk insurance pool faces its first real-world test
breaking.summary: India's new maritime insurance pool has received its first claim. A vessel covered by the arrangement was damaged in a drone attack. This incident marks the pool's initial test amid regional tensions. The claim is currently being assessed for payout within the pool's capacity. Government backing provides an additional layer for larger potential losses.

breaking.title: As Sonam Wangchuk hangs on to hunger strike, weight loss approaches 9 kg
breaking.summary: On the 18th day, activist Sonam Wangchuk continued his hunger strike demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, even as his vital signs showed a worsening condition

breaking.title: ICICI Lombard Q1 profit slumps 46% to Rs 403 crore on fire claims, SC verdict impact
breaking.summary: ICICI Lombard's net profit fell 46 per cent in the June quarter.  This decline resulted from two large fire insurance claims.  A Supreme Court judgment also impacted its motor third-party portfolio.  The insurer's combined ratio worsened to 107.2 percent from 102.9 percent.  Gross direct premium income rose seven point five percent during the quarter.
